heading: Discrimination in the provision of brokerage services
label: 3606 Discrimination in the provision of brokerage services
text: After , it shall be unlawful to deny any person access to or membership or participation in any multiple-listing service, real estate brokers’ organization or other service, organization, or facility relating to the business of selling or renting dwellings, or to discriminate against him in the terms or conditions of such access, membership, or participation, on account of race, color, religion, sex, handicap, familial status, or national origin.December 31, 1968
notes: Amendments1988— inserted “handicap, familial status,” after “sex,”.Pub. L. 100–4301974— inserted “, sex” after “religion”.Pub. L. 93–383

Effective Date of 1988 AmendmentAmendment by effective on 180th day beginning after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 100–430section 13(a) of Pub. L. 100–430section 3601 of this titleSept. 13, 1988
